route_summary: Your 60-minute deep-dive tour (balanced style) visits 16 key galleries across 47 rooms. We focused on ceramics and jade_hardstone from Chinese, Japanese. You're looking for something ancient, intricate, peaceful — we kept that in mind.

route.name: Gallery 202
route.reason: This gallery is rich in ceramics — right up your alley.

featured_artworks.title: Jar with dragon
featured_artworks.medium: Porcelain painted with cobalt blue under transparent glaze (Jingdezhen ware)
featured_artworks.alt_text: Porcelain jar decorated with a blue underglaze dragon among clouds and a band of lotus petals
featured_artworks.reason: You picked this in the survey — come see it in person.

featured_artworks.title: One from set of five squared food vessels (mukōzuke) for tea-gathering meal
featured_artworks.medium: Stoneware with iron-oxide and copper green overglaze decoration (Mino ware, Yashichida Oribe type)
featured_artworks.alt_text: Squared stoneware vessel with a cream glaze featuring a dark hook-like motif and a diagonal lattice pattern
featured_artworks.reason: Something a little different — see how ceramics from Japan adds to your journey.

featured_artworks.title: Clog-shaped tea bowl (kutsu-gata chawan) with plum blossoms and geometric patterns
featured_artworks.medium: Stoneware with iron-oxide decoration (Mino ware, Black Oribe type)
featured_artworks.alt_text: Irregularly shaped stoneware tea bowl with dark glaze and a white panel with iron-oxide patterns
featured_artworks.reason: A hidden gem — let yourself be surprised.

route.name: Chinese Ceramics & More!

featured_artworks.title: Vase

featured_artworks.reason: You picked this in the survey — come see it in person.

featured_artworks.title: Jar with Flowers
featured_artworks.medium: Porcelain painted with colored enamels over transparent glaze (Jingdezhen ware)

featured_artworks.title: Vase with Scene from the Dragon Boat Festival

featured_artworks.alt_text: Tall white porcelain vase decorated with a dragon-headed boat carrying a two-story pavilion and many people
featured_artworks.reason: A hidden gem — let yourself be surprised.

featured_artworks.title: Snuff bottle with camel wrangler and Manchu horse rider
